master_row.title: Configuration Force Bundle
master_row.canonical_statement: The companion theorem defines a configuration-force bundle with metric-induced volume form and volumetric force equilibration.
master_row.formation_inputs: g, x, n, M, F, V
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as a fourier/spectral transform relating g, x, n, M, F, V.
master_row.dictionary: The equation support layer follows M\ smooth\ Riemannian\ manifold; dV_g= g \,dx^1 dx^n; (M,F,V); Stillness(S) _Support(S)F_ (x)V[S,x]\,dx=0.
master_row.encyclopedia: The equation support layer follows \mathcal{M}\ \mathrm{smooth\ Riemannian\ manifold}; dV_g=\sqrt{|\det g|}\,dx^1\wedge\cdots\wedge dx^n; (\mathcal{M},\mathcal{F},\mathcal{V}); \mathrm{Stillness}(S)\Longleftrightarrow\int_{\mathrm{Support}(S)}F_{\mu}(x)V[S,x]\,dx=0. These relations are compact review objects, not unsupported placeholders.

formal_status.note: Proof package captures the theorem row, metadata, source truth, TeX source, and current semantic translation status.
